death.attack.scp294: %s died after drinking something SCP-294 should never have dispensed.
death.attack.scp294_106: %s was corroded from within by SCP-294's black liquid.
death.attack.scp294_butt_ghost: %s was claimed by the Butt Ghost.
death.attack.scp294_carbon: %s could not process pure carbon slurry.
death.attack.scp294_lifeforce: %s burned out after drinking concentrated lifeforce.
death.attack.scp294_violent_reaction: %s was erased by SCP-294's violent reaction.
